calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-23-2025 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ADVANCED PUBLIC AWARENESS Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ADVANCED PUBLIC AWARENESS' Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff Center for Advanced Public Awareness's unopposed Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, Plaintiff's motion to approve settlement pursuant to Health and Safety Code section 25249.7(f) and Code of Civil Procedure section 664.6 is granted. Based on the record before it, the court finds: (1) the injunctive relief required by the settlement complies with Proposition 65; (2) the penalty amounts, including the additional settlement payments in lieu of civil penalties (see 11 C.C.R. 3204) are reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health and Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2); and, (3) the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law. The consent judgments shall be entered consistent with the Proposition 65 Settlement and the parties' [Proposed] Consent Judgment.

Prior to the hearing time, Moving Party shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed order quoting the text above verbatim.

Prior to the hearing time, Moving Party must lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a copy of the proposed consent judgment executed by all relevant parties.

A proposed order and proposed consent judgment are submitted prior to the hearing.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2024 Set For Trial On Sep-29-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2024 Continued To Oct-02-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
